pages.text: The ring line is one of the simplest crafted progressions in the mod. It is intentionally readable, and it also feeds directly into the endgame weapon forging path.
The $(l)Gold Ring$() is the basic starter ring and grants +1 Armor by default.
The $(l)Cyan Ring$() upgrades from the Gold Ring and Oblivion Stone. It grants +2 Armor by default.
The $(l)Nebula Ring$() upgrades from the Cyan Ring and Oblivion Stone. It grants +3 Armor by default and is intended to add +1 Ring slot while worn.
